raw_text:
Luminox Labs

Building scalable, human-centered web experiences for the modern enterprise.

Now Hiring: Manager, Frontend Engineering

San Francisco, CA (Hybrid - 3 days/week on-site) · Full-time · $210,000 - $270,000 + equity

W

e're seeking an experienced Manager of Frontend Engineering to lead a team of 5-7 frontend engineers.

In this role, you'll own hiring, mentorship, technical direction, and delivery for our core product

frontend. You'll balance hands-on technical leadership with people management—your team builds customer-

facing features using React, TypeScript, and Next.js while maintaining strict performance and accessibility

standards. This is an ideal opportunity for someone who loves both code and developing engineers.

A B O U T U S

Luminox Labs is a Series B SaaS company focused on creating enterprise workflow automation tools. We

serve over 500 mid-market to enterprise clients across finance, healthcare, and logistics sectors. Our frontend

team builds sophisticated, accessible interfaces that handle millions of daily interactions. We're backed by Tier-

1 venture capital and are experiencing significant growth—we've tripled our engineering headcount in the past

18 months.

Y O U R R O L E

Lead, hire, and mentor a team of 5-7 frontend engineers across varying experience levels; conduct 1:1s,
performance reviews, and create individual development plans aligned with career growth

Establish technical standards and best practices for frontend development, including TypeScript usage,

component patterns, and accessibility compliance (WCAG 2.1 AA minimum)

Design and implement a web performance strategy using tools like Lighthouse, WebPageTest, and custom

monitoring; own Core Web Vitals metrics and drive improvements across the product

Collaborate with Product and Design to translate user requirements into robust frontend architecture; lead

design reviews and technical RFCs for significant features

Oversee the adoption and optimization of build tooling (Webpack/Vite), CSS-in-JS solutions (Tailwind

CSS), and state management libraries; make toolchain decisions that reduce toil and improve developer

experience

Champion accessibility best practices across the team; ensure all features meet WCAG 2.1 standards and

conduct quarterly a11y audits

Partner with backend and infrastructure teams to define API contracts and optimize data fetching strategies;

advocate for frontend needs in cross-functional planning

Contribute hands-on code 20-30% of the time on critical path features, architectural initiatives, and
mentoring through pair programming and code reviews

 Define frontend team OKRs, drive project delivery, and manage stakeholder communication around

timelines, scope, and technical debt

R E Q U I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

6+ years of professional frontend development experience with demonstrated expertise in React and
TypeScript on production systems

3+ years of people management experience: hiring, mentoring, performance management, and building

high-performing teams

Deep proficiency with Next.js, modern CSS (Tailwind CSS or similar), and build tools (Webpack/Vite);

ability to evaluate and improve build performance

Strong understanding of web accessibility standards (WCAG) and demonstrated track record implementing

accessible components and patterns

Proven experience optimizing web performance (Core Web Vitals, bundle size optimization, lazy loading,

caching strategies)

Excellent communication skills and ability to mentor engineers at different career levels; comfort with
difficult conversations and feedback delivery

Experience collaborating across product, design, and backend teams in fast-paced startup environments

D E S I R E D Q U A L I F I C AT I O N S

Experience with headless CMS, complex data visualization, or real-time collaborative editing (e.g.,

operational transformation, CRDTs)

Familiarity with web security best practices (CSP, XSS prevention, dependency scanning)

Track record of scaling engineering teams from 2-3 to 5+ engineers; experience defining hiring processes
and leveling frameworks

Open source contributions or speaking experience on frontend topics

Experience with testing frameworks (Vitest, Playwright, React Testing Library) and commitment to quality

metrics

T O O L S  O F  T H E T R A D E

React 18+, TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Webpack/Vite, Vitest & React Testing Library, Accessibility
(WCAG, axe, screen readers), Web Performance APIs (Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse), Node.js & npm/pnpm,

Git & GitHub

W E O F F E R

Competitive equity package (0.3% - 0.6% depending on experience)

Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage (100% premiums for employee + 80% for family)

Unlimited PTO + 12 company holidays + parental leave (16 weeks)

Professional development budget ($5,000/year for conferences, courses, training)

 Home office stipend ($2,500 one-time, $200/month ongoing)

Mental health support (therapy access via Ginger, $200/month counseling stipend)

401(k) matching (4% match, immediate vesting)

Commuter benefits and free lunch 3 days/week on-site

T O A P P LY

Submit your resume, a cover letter highlighting your most significant people management achievement, and

links to your GitHub profile or portfolio. Apply via our careers page at luminoxlabs.com/careers. Referrals are

highly encouraged—introduce us to great frontend managers in your network and we'll offer a $5,000 referral

bonus. First-round interviews are typically 30-minute calls with our VP Engineering. We review applications
on a rolling basis.
